Title: Establishes the crime of interference with first responders; safety buffer zone
Summary: Establishes the crime of interference with first responders; creates a fifteen foot buffer zone around first responders engaged in the performance of their official duties.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the penal law, in relation to establishing a fifteen-foot safety buffer zone around a New York state, New York city and local municipal first responder, a judge of any court of law of this state, or a state, county or municipal prosecutor engaged in the performance of their official duties
